Title: Successful Login
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the valid username and password.
3. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result: The user is successfully logged in and redirected to the main page.

Title: Incorrect Login
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the invalid username and password.
3. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result: The user is not logged in, and an error message is displayed.

Title: Successful Query Execution
Test Steps:
1. Define a valid query.
2. Execute the query.
Expected Result: The query is executed successfully, and the expected results are displayed.

Title: Failed Query Execution
Preconditions: An invalid query has been defined.
Test Steps:
1. Define an invalid query.
2. Execute the query.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the query is not executed.

Title: Successful Object Creation
Preconditions: A valid object has been defined.
Test Steps:
1. Define a valid object.
2. Insert the object data into the database.
Expected Result: The object is successfully created and inserted into the database.

Title: Failed Object Creation
Preconditions: An invalid object has been defined.
Test Steps:
1. Define an invalid object.
2. Insert the object data into the database.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the object is not created or inserted into the database.

Title: Successful Object Deletion
Preconditions: A valid object has been selected for deletion.
Test Steps:

2. Execute the query to delete the object from the database.
Expected Result: The object is successfully deleted from the database.
